headline: Broadcom (AVGO) Launches $35 Billion AI Platform With Apollo Blackstone And Anthropic
summary: Broadcom, Apollo and Blackstone have launched the AI XPV Platform to support over 20 gigawatts of AI compute capacity through 2028. The initiative includes an initial $35b tranche focused on large scale deployment of Anthropic’s compute infrastructure. The platform is built around Broadcom’s XPUs and networking products, targeting hyperscale AI data centers. For investors tracking NasdaqGS:AVGO, this move adds a fresh operational layer to the Broadcom story that goes beyond recent share...
